doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: The document mixes the authentic ABA Model Rule 5.5 framework with fabricated subsection (b) restrictions on paralegal activity and false claims about emergency exceptions that do not exist in the actual rule.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 35
REASON: The document uses authentic ABA Model Rule 5.5 framework but subsection (b)'s detailed restrictions on paralegal activity and the explicit "no emergency exception" language do not appear in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which focuses on attorney multijurisdictional practice; the content appears partially fabricated or substantially elaborated beyond the genuine rule.
